title: oncoba ngounyensis
intro: Oncoba ngounyensis is a plant species belonging to the family Salicaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Oncoba ngounyensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and a treatment for skin conditions. Traditional herbal preparations of Oncoba ngounyensis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
